interaction_phrase: IBM Qiskit and Google Cirq circuits
occurrence_sentence: With GPU acceleration, algorithm testing can be done in seconds instead of hours, driving faster development. Forge enables GPU acceleration with: * A new library that experts can use to compose circuits * Automatic importing and translation of IBM Qiskit and Google Cirq circuits * Integration with GPUs on the cloud, to which users can submit problems
